entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `local_date` TEXT NOT NULL, `brew_count` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `created_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_hand_brew_records_local_date
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_hand_brew_records_local_date` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`local_date`)
